name: Herbed Fresh Tomato Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons olive oil or cooking oil
6 medium tomatoes, peeled and quartered (about 2 lbs)
2 tablespoons fresh basil, snipped, or 2 teaspoons dried, crushed basil
1 tablespoon fresh thyme, snipped, or 1 teaspoon dried thyme
A few dashes of bottled hot pepper sauce
recipeInstructions:
Serve 8 portions.
In a large saucepan, cook the onions in hot oil until tender. Stir in water, tomatoes, tomato paste, basil, thyme, bouillon granules, sugar, salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 40 minutes. Place about one-third of the tomato mixture into a blender container or food processor bowl and process until smooth (or press through a food mill). Repeat with the remaining mixture. Reheat half of the mixture and serve immediately. To freeze the remaining mixture, allow it to cool, then pour into a 3-cup freezer container, seal, label, and freeze. To serve a frozen portion, transfer to a medium saucepan. Cover and cook over medium heat for 20-25 minutes or until heated through, stirring occasionally. Sprinkle with parsley before serving.
Serves 4.
